scripts.ci:quality: pnpm --filter @gorola/shared build && pnpm security:audit && pnpm lint --max-warnings 0 && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.ci:prisma: pnpm --filter @gorola/api exec prisma generate && pnpm --filter @gorola/api exec prisma migrate deploy

_pnpm_overrides_comments.ip-address: Overridden due to moderate security vulnerability in <=10.1.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.hono: Overridden due to moderate security vulnerabilities (body bypass/HTML injection) in <4.12.16
_pnpm_overrides_comments.fast-uri: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (path traversal) in <=3.1.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.@opentelemetry/sdk-node: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (DoS/Process crash) in <0.217.0
_pnpm_overrides_comments.@opentelemetry/exporter-prometheus: Overridden due to high security vulnerability (DoS/Process crash) in <0.217.0
